summary: V5.7 integration testing complete. Backend: 14/14 pytest passed (auth login JWT, 4 AI agents POST with Claude replies, history, jobs, dev contracts, system-templates, ANAF invoices list, admin/config auth + return). Frontend: All flows pass — Login shows 'Energy Project Design — international electronic technical documentation, certified and digitally stamped' tagline (no StampDoc), index.html title correct, Landing /'O platformă, 5 perspective' section renders 5 persona tiles with correct data-testids, all 5 /pentru/{role} pages render persona-title + persona-benefits (5 benefits each), sidebar shows 'Industrii (13)', /ai-agents shows 4 agent picker tiles and user agent successfully responded in Romanian with markdown-formatted explanation about 5 kWp, sitemap.xml is 200 OK and contains /pentru/clienti + /pentru/utilizatori URLs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2060+ lines — recommended to extract /ai/agents/* + /anaf/* into dedicated routers (already started with admin_routes.py + marketplace_routes.py). Maintainability concern flagged in iteration_1 still applies.

AI agent endpoint /api/ai/agents/{agent} POST has no rate limit / cost guard for unbounded Claude calls — every authenticated user can spam. Recommend per-user per-minute throttling and a max-tokens cap.
The AI history GET uses limit=30 default — consider adding pagination/offset for power users with large chat histories.

/api/ai/agents (GET) returns 'planned/skeleton' marketing info but actual POST endpoint is fully functional — slightly misleading; either keep both or rename the GET to /api/ai/agents/info to avoid confusion.

Personas.jsx hardcodes a 5-persona map — fine for now, but if a 6th persona is added the sitemap.xml + Landing.jsx persona section must be kept in sync manually. Consider extracting PERSONAS into a shared module imported by Landing + Personas + a sitemap-generator script.
test_credentials: Admin: dragosserban95@gmail.com / Test12345 — used successfully for both backend JWT login and frontend UI login (lands on /dashboard).
seed_data_creation: None. AI agent POST calls created persisted history entries under the admin user (4 messages: producer/user/client/developer) — these are visible in /api/ai/agents/{agent}/history and in the UI chat history. Not cleaned up; namespaced to admin user only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5.7 fully validated end-to-end. Login branding correct; sidebar shows (13); all 5 persona pages live at /pentru/{clienti|utilizatori|angajati|developeri|admin}; sitemap.xml served at root and lists both persona URLs and 13 industries. AI Agents: 4 personas work, Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Emergent LLM key produces Romanian replies in 5-15s. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_v57_features.py — reuse and extend for V5.8. Older suites: test_v45_features.py, test_v46_features.py, test_v54_admin_features.py also present. Note carry-over from iteration_1: PV route is /fotovoltaic (NOT /calcul-fotovoltaic) and GET /api/users/me is 405 (use /api/auth/me).
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in V5.7 scope. All 7 backend endpoints + 7 frontend assertions in the review request pass.
